about.title: Hey!
about.welcome: Welcome to our online store Selsa. If you are a fan of shopping, especially t-shirts, come check out our store!
about.unique: Every model in our shop is unique. Our items are well designed, better quality, and comfortable to wear—and extra affordable. We try to stay unique and stylish. We're improving our stuff every day.
about.collab: We try to come up with things that satisfy everyone. Items can also be the result of collaborations with family, friends, and teams.
clothing.title: Clothing
clothing.description: Introducing our latest collection: a curated selection of seasonal fashion trends to elevate your style game.
newCollection.title: New Collection
newCollection.quote: Soft, comfy, and stylish: the perfect blend of comfort and fashion.
